faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Perth Amboy, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Perth Amboy typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We offer free inspections to provide accurate quotes for your specific situation and work with most budgets to ensure effective elimination.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Perth Amboy homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Perth Amboy are completed in 4-8 hours for an average-sized home, with heat treatments often requiring just one day. Chemical treatments may need 2-3 applications spaced weeks apart for complete elimination. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your free inspection based on your property's specific needs.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Perth Amboy?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are completely safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-registered products and follow strict safety protocols. Heat treatments are chemical-free, while our conventional treatments require only a brief 4-6 hour absence from treated areas before safe re-entry.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee bed bug elimination in Perth Amboy?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Perth Amboy. If bed bugs return within the warranty period (typically 30-90 days depending on treatment type), we'll re-treat your property at no additional charge. Our multi-step approach ensures complete elimination of all bed bugs and their eggs.
